title: Appointment Rescheduling Policy
body: Routine appointments may be rescheduled through approved administrative channels. The assistant may explain steps but must not make clinical decisions.

title: Medical Records Request Policy
body: Records requests require identity and authorization verification. Requests involving another person's records should be routed to the privacy office.

title: Emergency Boundary Policy
body: Administrative assistants must not diagnose, interpret symptoms, or interpret lab results. Urgent symptoms should be redirected to clinical or emergency channels.
